title: Choose your plan

publish.description: Compare the Starter, Growth, Pro and Enterprise tiers, spot the Most popular plan, and start your 7-day free trial.

intro: The **Plans** page lays out qSortBy's four tiers side by side. This guide helps you compare them, understand the free trial, and pick the plan that fits your store.

steps.heading: Compare the tiers
steps.body: Open **Plans & Billing** from the left menu. qSortBy comes in four tiers — **Starter**, **Growth**, **Pro** and **Enterprise** — shown side by side with what each includes. Read down a column to see how collection limits, signals and automation scale as you move up.

els.text: Open Plans & Billing from the left menu — the four tiers sit side by side.

steps.heading: Spot the most popular plan
steps.body: One tier is badged **Most popular** — it's the plan most stores land on because it balances price against the signals and automation most catalogs need. It's a safe default if you're unsure where to start.

els.text: The Most popular badge marks the tier most stores choose — a solid default if you're unsure.

steps.heading: Start your free trial
steps.body: Every paid tier opens with a **7-day free trial**, so you can try qSortBy on your real catalog before you're billed. Select **Start 7-day free trial** on the plan you want — you can switch tiers later from **Settings → Current plan**.

els.text: Select Start 7-day free trial on your chosen plan — nothing is billed for the first 7 days.

notes.text: You can change or cancel your plan any time from Settings — the trial only starts billing once it ends.

outro: That's plans and billing: compare the four tiers, lean on the Most popular badge if you're unsure, and start risk-free with the 7-day free trial.
